channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-06-23 to 2026-06-29
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Tue 2026-06-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.4 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 3 kt SSE, water 60°F. Low tide: 08:55, 21:38. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.4 ft); period too short (5.2 sec); wind direction off (SSE). Wed 2026-06-24: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 11:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt NNW, water 64°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Thu 2026-06-25: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 2 kt NW, water 63°F. Low tide: 10:28, 23:17. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Fri 2026-06-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 4.8 sec, wind 5 kt SSW, water 62°F. Low tide: 11:12. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); period too short (4.8 sec); wind direction off (SSW). Sat 2026-06-27: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 5 kt E, water 62°F. Low tide: 00:03, 11:55. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (E). Sun 2026-06-28: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 8 kt NE, water 64°F. Low tide: 00:48, 12:39. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NE). Mon 2026-06-29: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 7.6 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 65°F. Low tide: 01:32, 13:24. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Tue 2026-06-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.4 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 3 kt SSE, water 60°F. Low tide: 08:55, 21:38. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.4 ft); period too short (5.2 sec); wind direction off (SSE).
  • Wed 2026-06-24: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 11:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt NNW, water 64°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Thu 2026-06-25: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 2 kt NW, water 63°F. Low tide: 10:28, 23:17. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Fri 2026-06-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 4.8 sec, wind 5 kt SSW, water 62°F. Low tide: 11:12. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); period too short (4.8 sec); wind direction off (SSW).
  • Sat 2026-06-27: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 5 kt E, water 62°F. Low tide: 00:03, 11:55. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (E).
  • Sun 2026-06-28: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 8 kt NE, water 64°F. Low tide: 00:48, 12:39. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NE).
  • Mon 2026-06-29: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 7.6 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 65°F. Low tide: 01:32, 13:24. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
